LanguageData.SC_CheeseCurrentlyFrozen: This cheese is frozen and will not age.
LanguageData.SC_CheeseCurrentlyRefrigerated: This cheese is refrigerated and will not age as fast as it could (ages in {0})
LanguageData.SC_CheeseAgingCorrectly: This cheese is dry-aging properly (ages in {0})
